title: Craftable totem of undying by LiterallySeek
description: Now you can craft Totem Of Undying, enjoy !
body:
Now you can craft Totem Of Undying, enjoy !

Crafting in Images

You need :

4 gold blocks

2 emerald blocks

1 golden apple

With this mod you can get totem of undying without getting to a woodland mansion or activating a raid
